origin.description: Specifies the origin of the lien, typically indicating the service or account responsible for creating it. Must be a valid string.

parent.description: Specifies the parent resource (folder or organization) to which the lien is attached; must be in the format "folders/{folder_id}" or "organizations/{organization_id}".

reason.description: Specifies the justification for creating the lien, detailing its purpose or necessity.

restrictions.description: Specifies the actions and resources that are restricted by the lien; must be a valid list of constraints defined by Google Cloud.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for operations before timing out; must be specified in Terraform's timeout format.
